title: [Griffin's Keen, Inner Trail]
description: A narrow arch has been carved through one of the particularly broad outthrusts of rock.  The work is hurried and inelegant, with the far side of it being no more than a broken opening.  Still, without it, the trail would have ended here.

wayto.4603: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
